title: delphinium staphisagria subsp. pictum
intro: Delphinium staphisagria subsp. pictum, also known as the Pictum staphisagria or Pictum delphinium, is a subspecies of the staphisagria delphinium, a plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Delphinium staphisagria subsp. pictum has been reported to have antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and easing menstrual cramps. Delphinium staphisagria subsp. pictum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its medicinal properties can also be extracted through cold pressing or distillation to create essential oils.
